objective: Gateway and broker discover each other via iroh gossip. Mutual peer.connected spans appear in Jaeger.
in_scope: Wire iroh discovery providers (mdns + manual seed list via RAFKA_SEED_NODES env var)
On peer connection establishment, emit rafka.mesh.peer.connected
Peer-side: emit rafka.mesh.peer.disconnected on link drop
out_of_scope: Sending payload data between peers — Sprint 04
exit_criteria: Run gateway + broker concurrently with RAFKA_SEED_NODES wired
Within 5s, BOTH services emit rafka.mesh.peer.discovered + rafka.mesh.peer.connected
Jaeger trace shows the mutual discovery as a cross-service trace
Kill one process: surviving process emits rafka.mesh.peer.disconnected within 4×heartbeat
Jaeger URL pre-filtered to the discovery trace
